race.description: Garrards Horse & Hound Easter Cup Hcp Pace (G3)
race.comment: FRANCO MOTU NZ (13) comes here fresh from victory a week ago over 2503m at this track, scoring by 15 metres. Looms as the one to beat. LAST HARD COPY (9) is looking for black-type success after suffering a defeat last time out a much weaker race over 2503m here, arriving a head behind the winner. A big performance is expected. CAPTAIN RAVISHING (14) comes here following a Group One eighth four months ago over 2536m at this circuit, beaten 13 metres by Minstrel. Looms as a significant threat. LUVBITE (2) could only manage tenth last start over 2360m at Tamworth, beaten 180 metres. Monitor market moves.
